title: Resurgence
description: Resurgence ME is a curated, immersive modded Minecraft Server centered around realistic medieval survival, roleplay, and worldbuilding.
body:
## Resurgence ME is a curated medieval survival server.
Historically inspired, immersive world where realism, building, and light roleplay intertwine.

![Trost](https://imgur.com/a/eb2ELol)

Built around the Conquest Reforged mod, it elevates the visual and architectural fidelity of the game, offering thousends of new blocks tailored for authentic medieval construction. Complemented by a handpicked selection of mods, it enhances combat, economy, and world interaction to support structured faction play, dynamic warfare, and politically grounded storytelling. You will find yourself in a living, lore-rich continent where every build contributes to a shared history, from rugged castles and weathered villages to fortified trade routes and war-torn frontiers. Whether you're a seasoned builder, a roleplay enthusiast,a lord seeking control over territory and legacy, Resurgence ME offers a deeply immersive medieval experience unlike any other.

## Join the discord for more info.
Showcase vid maybe soon?

Bliss-shader-main from: [https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)
